mission.title: kubeflow: Feature: Profile plugin for Azure AD workload identity
mission.description:
## Closes https://github.com/kubeflow/dashboard/issues/26

For Azure AD workload identity You have to : 
- Add annotations to the service account `azure.workload.identity/client-id : "xxxxxxxx"`
- Add a label to every pod willing to use that identity  `azure.workload.identity/use : "true"`

I have added the necessary code to modify the annotation for default service account. 

I am still looking for a way to modify pod labels across a profile. The only solution i think is to add a PodDefault component with that label name

I am awaiting feedback on this before i write unit tests and add docs. Thank you 😄

resolution.summary:
Can you join the next Notebooks Working Group or Manifest working Group meeting? We are always looking for help. And this is where you can present your PR. Just propose it on the agenda and join.

https://www.kubeflow.org/docs/about/community/#kubeflow-community-calendars has the calendar and meeting notes.

You can also reach us on slack in the channel wg-notebooks and wg-manifests
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
